decisions.reasoning: Nvidia reports Q1 FY2027 earnings after the market close today. Analyst consensus expects $78.75B-$79.2B revenue and $1.76-$1.78 EPS, up ~120% YoY. Hyperscalers committed ~$725B in 2026 capex, up 77% YoY. New positive: Chinese firms including Alibaba, Tencent, ByteDance, JD.com received approval to purchase H200 chips. Stock uptrend intact, 10-day SMA $222 vs 30-day SMA $207.6. Position is 1 day old so 3-day no-churn rule applies; already ~20% of equity near single-order cap so no add. Hold through earnings given bullish structural backdrop.

decisions.invalidation: Revenue miss below $76B or weak Q2 guidance, significant deceleration in data center orders, or custom silicon ASICs gaining faster-than-expected share from CUDA ecosystem.

decisions.reasoning: No new bearish catalyst for today's weakness; price action reflects continuation of 2026 capex-and-OpenAI-investment overhang weighing on MSFT all year. Ex-dividend date is May 21 at $0.91/share, capturing $4.55 in dividends by holding. Analyst consensus target $587.31 implying ~42% upside. Bill Ackman Pershing Square recently bought shares -- notable contrarian positive. 3-day rule applies. Strong Azure cloud RPO backlog supports medium-term thesis.

decisions.invalidation: Azure growth deceleration beyond current trend, material increase in OpenAI losses, or broad tech selloff triggered by NVDA earnings miss tonight.

decisions.reasoning: S&P 500 ticking up ~0.34% today to ~7403 ahead of NVDA earnings. SMA signal long, 10-day $738.3 above 30-day $717.8. Market supported by AI-driven earnings revisions; Yardeni raised year-end target to 8250, JPM to 7600. No new macro catalyst today -- Fed held rates at 3.50-3.75% at April FOMC. Core CPI re-acceleration to 3.3% in March is a background risk. Position 1 day old.

decisions.invalidation: NVDA earnings miss causing broad tech selloff, unexpected hawkish Fed commentary, or CPI re-acceleration above 4%.

decisions.reasoning: Retaining $3702.86 cash as dry powder ahead of NVDA binary earnings event tonight. Market at all-time highs, inflation elevated at 3.3% CPI, Fed in leadership transition with Warsh replacing Powell. Will reassess tomorrow: deploy into QQQ/XLK/NVDA add if NVDA beats, or rotate to defensive names like XLV/XLE if miss triggers tech selloff.

decisions.invalidation: N/A -- reassess tomorrow based on NVDA earnings outcome.

summary: First session: held all three day-old positions (NVDA, MSFT, SPY); no trades; retained $3.7K cash ahead of NVDA post-close earnings tonight.
open_theses: NVDA: Hold through Q1 FY2027 earnings tonight; AI capex supercycle and China H200 approval are structural tailwinds; watch for beat-and-guide-up.
MSFT: Ex-dividend May 21 at $0.91; holding for recovery toward analyst consensus $587; capex overhang likely to fade as Azure re-accelerates.
SPY: Broad market uptrend intact; holding core index exposure as portfolio anchor.
CASH: $3.7K dry powder -- deploy tomorrow into QQQ or sector ETFs if NVDA beats, or into defensive names XLV/XLE if miss triggers tech selloff.
